home.kicker: Consumer AI Agent · Israel · Stage 1: Mobile
home.sub: Zakai detects inflated mobile bills, drafts a professional request and acts on your behalf — taking a fee only from money that actually returns to you.
trust: Pay only on success — 18% of savings
Full disclosure — a digital agent, with your authorization
home.scopeNote: At this stage Zakai handles mobile bills only, over a messaging channel (email/form). More categories and channels come only once this path has proven itself.

calc.title: How much could you save?
calc.sub: Move the slider to match what you pay for mobile each month
calc.note: Estimate only, based on a typical 10%–25% negotiation range. Actual results depend on provider and plan, and are not guaranteed.

flow.dropTitle: Upload a photo of your mobile bill
flow.dropSub: Drag it here or click — analysis starts instantly
flow.analyzingSub: Detecting provider, amount and savings opportunity
flow.readError: Couldn't read the image. Try a clearer one or enter manually.
flow.aiUnavailable: The analysis service is currently unavailable. You can enter the details manually and continue.
flow.marketContext: Typical range for a similar plan
flow.strategyTitle: What Zakai plans to ask for
flow.draftTitle: The request sent on your behalf
flow.draftNote: This is exactly what will be sent to the provider. You approve it before it goes out.
flow.editDraft: Want to change something? Edit the text
flow.consentLabel: I authorize Zakai to act on my behalf with
flow.consentLabel2: regarding this matter, as described above. This authorization is recorded with a timestamp.
flow.sentSub: Zakai now tracks the provider's reply. When it arrives, update the new amount here to document the saving.
flow.trackSub: When you get a reply (or a new bill), enter the new monthly amount here. Zakai compares it to the documented original.
flow.feeExplain: You pay only because it worked. No saving, no fee.
flow.noSaving: No saving was documented for this request — so there is no fee. You can try another provider or plan.

verify.title: Verification before acting
verify.sub: Before Zakai acts for you, we confirm two things — that the account is really yours, and that there's a documented authorization the provider can check. This is what makes a rep take the request seriously.
verify.ownershipSub: We sent a 6-digit code to {phone}. Enter it to confirm the account is yours.
verify.ownershipDevNote: Dev mode: the code is written to the system Outbox instead of being sent by SMS.
verify.codeInvalid: Wrong or expired code. Try again.
verify.codeExpired: The code expired. Request a new one.
verify.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Request a new code in a few minutes.
verify.authSub: Zakai generates a formal power-of-attorney-style authorization for you, with a unique verification code. It is attached to the request, and the provider can open the link to confirm the authorization is genuine and active.
verify.bothRequired: Both verifications must be completed to continue.

authorizationDoc.docTitle: Power of Attorney for Action Toward a Provider
authorizationDoc.subtitle: Authorization document — Zakai service
authorizationDoc.scopeBody: The principal authorizes Zakai to contact the provider named above on their behalf, regarding review of the monthly charge and its reduction or plan adjustment, and to conduct the necessary correspondence for that purpose. This authorization is limited to this matter only, and does not include entering new transactions, changing payment methods, or disclosing sensitive information beyond what is needed for identification.
authorizationDoc.disclosure: Zakai is an automated digital agent acting on the customer's behalf. Zakai does not impersonate the customer. The provider is welcome to contact the customer directly using the details in this document.
authorizationDoc.verifyBody: To confirm this document is genuine and active, scan the code or go to the following address and enter the verification code:

verifyPage.title: Verify a Zakai authorization document
verifyPage.sub: If you received a request from Zakai on a customer's behalf, you can confirm here that the authorization is genuine and active.
verifyPage.notFound: No authorization document found for this code.
verifyPage.revoked: This authorization document has been revoked and is not active.

legal.agree: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
legal.termsNote: Sample wording for a prototype. A commercial version requires drafting by a lawyer.
terms: Zakai is an automated tool that drafts and sends requests on the user's behalf, with explicit per-request authorization. No outcome or saving is guaranteed.
The success fee (18%) is charged only from documented actual savings (a documented difference between the original and new amount). No documented saving — no charge.
Every request discloses to the provider that Zakai is a digital agent acting for the customer with authorization. Zakai never impersonates the customer.
Before any action on your behalf, Zakai verifies your account (a code to your registered phone) and generates an authorization document with a code the provider can check.
Your data is processed only for the service, encrypted, and never sold to third parties.
The service is not legal, financial or insurance advice, and does not claim to be a negotiation expert.

trustPage.title: Security & Trust
trustPage.intro: Zakai is built around trust: we act on your behalf toward companies and handle sensitive financial data. This page explains, transparently, how we protect your data and how the fee model works.
security: Encryption in transit: all communication with the site is encrypted over HTTPS/TLS, with an HSTS policy that enforces a secure connection.
Encryption at rest: data is stored in a managed database with storage-layer encryption.
Secrets & keys: API keys and secrets are never in the code — they are injected only as secure environment variables.
Verification codes: the SMS ownership code is stored hashed only (never in the clear), with expiry and an attempt cap.
Rate limiting: login, signup and code-sending endpoints are rate-limited to prevent abuse.
Monitoring: system errors are logged and monitored so issues are detected and fixed quickly.
Dependency scanning: software dependencies are scanned automatically for known vulnerabilities.
trust: We charge an 18% fee only from documented actual savings (a documented difference between the original and new amount). No saving — no charge.
Every request is sent only after your explicit approval, and after account-ownership verification plus an authorization document with a code the company can check.
Every request discloses to the company that Zakai is a digital agent acting on your behalf — we never impersonate you.
No overblown promises: Zakai is an automated tool that drafts and sends requests, not an 'expert' with human experience.
trustPage.dispute: When a fee is charged, we email you an automatic confirmation with a full breakdown (original amount, new amount, saving and fee). If you believe the saving did not actually materialize, you have {days} days from receiving the email to contact us for review — and if the saving turns out not to have taken effect, the fee is cancelled or refunded. Contact: {email}
trustPage.contact: Found a security issue or have a question? We'd like to hear from you: {email}
trustPage.disclaimer: This document describes the prototype's security and trust policy. A commercial version will be accompanied by full legal documents (Terms of Use and Privacy Policy) drafted by a lawyer. Nothing here is legal advice.
